requirement_topic.en: EMC for Off-Board EV Charging Equipment

summary.en: IEC 61851-21-2:2018 addresses EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems. For Chile-facing AC or DC chargers, EMC evidence should be reviewed against the requested IEC route, installation environment, grid impact, radio disturbance, immunity, and any customer or utility limits.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-21-2:2018规定非车载电动汽车充电系统的EMC要求。面向智利的交流或直流充电桩，应按被要求的IEC路线、安装环境、电网影响、无线电骚扰、抗扰度以及客户或电力公司限值审查EMC证据。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-21-2:2018規定非車載電動汽車充電系統的EMC要求。面向智利的交流或直流充電樁，應按被要求的IEC路線、安裝環境、電網影響、無線電騷擾、抗擾度以及客戶或電力公司限值審查EMC證據。

summary.en: China EMC evidence may be based on GB/T 18487.2 for off-board conductive charging equipment and related GB/T EMC standards. The test setup, port classification, limits, and installation conditions should be mapped before using Chinese reports for Chile-facing submissions.
summary.zh: 中国EMC证据可能基于GB/T 18487.2非车载传导供电设备及相关GB/T EMC标准。将中国报告用于面向智利的提交前，应映射测试布置、端口分类、限值和安装条件。
summary.zht: 中國EMC證據可能基於GB/T 18487.2非車載傳導供電設備及相關GB/T EMC標準。將中國報告用於面向智利的提交前，應映射測試佈置、端口分類、限值和安裝條件。

gap.en: Check conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, DC-port behavior, communication ports, cable lengths, enclosure variants, and worst-case power settings. A China EMC report may need retesting if the Chile model uses a different connector, cable, enclosure, firmware, or grid filter.
gap.zh: 应核查传导和辐射骚扰、抗扰度、谐波、闪变、直流端口行为、通信端口、电缆长度、外壳变型和最不利功率设置。如果智利型号采用不同接口、电缆、外壳、固件或电网滤波器，中国EMC报告可能需要重新测试。
gap.zht: 應核查傳導和輻射騷擾、抗擾度、諧波、閃變、直流端口行為、通信端口、電纜長度、外殼變型和最不利功率設定。如果智利型號採用不同接口、電纜、外殼、韌體或電網濾波器，中國EMC報告可能需要重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where incorporated by SEC protocol, installation approval, utility requirement, tender, or customer specification; otherwise a common technical due-diligence expectation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or voluntary depending on Chinese certification catalogue, product type, and project or buyer requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EMC as a model-configuration and installation-context gap. Reusing a China report is risky unless the tested configuration and IEC 61851-21-2:2018 evidence matrix match the Chile-bound charger.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EMC应作为型号配置和安装环境差距处理。除非测试配置和IEC 61851-21-2:2018证据矩阵与出口智利型号一致，否则直接复用中国报告存在风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EMC應作為型號配置和安裝環境差距處理。除非測試配置和IEC 61851-21-2:2018證據矩陣與出口智利型號一致，否則直接複用中國報告存在風險。
